task: Parse a Word standard review packet, extract clauses, compliance table, dates, risks, recommendations, quality logs, recovery decision, and retrieval chunks.
plan: Inspect input type and task objective
Parse document with MinerU or native HTML extractor
Normalize content blocks with page-level or document-level provenance
Build markdown, section, key-value, table, and numeric views
Run quality checks and produce traceable logs
Prioritize section hierarchy and clause-like paragraph extraction
Preserve source page or document heading evidence for each clause

sections.title: Industry Standard Review Packet
sections.text:
Document ID: DOCX-2026-STD-02

Effective Date: 2026-05-23

Purpose: evaluate Word document structure extraction, clause tables, risk fields, recommendations, and document-level provenance.

sections.title: 1. Compliance Matrix
sections.text:
| Clause | Requirement | Evidence | Risk |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1.1 | Every run must keep trace logs. | trace.json | low |
| 1.2 | Structured outputs must include tables and key-values. | result.json | medium |
| 1.3 | Warnings must not be hidden from reviewers. | quality.issues | medium |

sections.title: 2. Exception Handling
sections.text:
Risk: missing provenance should trigger review instead of silent pass.

Recommendation: inspect recovery_decision before exporting downstream chunks.

Owner: Data Governance Office

rows: Every run must keep trace logs.

extracted.markdown_preview:
# Industry Standard Review Packet

Document ID: DOCX-2026-STD-02

Effective Date: 2026-05-23

Purpose: evaluate Word document structure extraction, clause tables, risk fields, recommendations, and document-level provenance.

## 1. Compliance Matrix

| Clause | Requirement | Evidence | Risk |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1.1 | Every run must keep trace logs. | trace.json | low |
| 1.2 | Structured outputs must include tables and key-values. | result.json | medium |
| 1.3 | Warnings must not be hidden from reviewers. | quality.issues | medium |

## 2. Exception Handling

Risk: missing provenance should trigger review instead of silent pass.

Recommendation: inspect recovery_decision before exporting downstream chunks.

Owner: Data Governance Office

issues.message: Native document input has document-level provenance rather than page-level provenance.

actions: Native extractor result has document/slide-level provenance; use PDF/MinerU path for page-layout audit.
